data.title: Three moves for a better AI operating model
data.subtitle: A compact playbook for teams moving from experiments to durable workflows.

sections.headline: Map the workflow before choosing tools
sections.body: The system gets easier to improve when handoffs, decisions, and failure points are visible.

sections.headline: Keep human review where judgment matters
sections.body: Automation should reduce repetitive work without hiding consequential decisions from accountable people.

sections.headline: Measure the operating outcome
sections.body: Track cycle time, quality, rework, and customer impact instead of model usage alone.

data.cta: Build the workflow, then automate it.
